findings.claim_text: Expected maximum GHG neutralization using carbon credits: 10% by 2050
findings.source_locator: 4 credit entries found: CC-2025-VCS-001 (300 tCO2e), CC-2025-VCS-002 (200 tCO2e), CC-2025-PV-001 (350 tCO2e), CC-2025-PV-002 (250 tCO2e)
findings.explanation: The PDF mentions 10% GHG neutralization using carbon credits by 2050 as a target. The carbon_credits_register.xlsx contains 4 cancelled credits (1,100 tCO2e total) for FY2025. Two credits (CC-2025-PV-001 and CC-2025-PV-002) have missing certificate_url fields, indicating incomplete documentation. The 10% neutralization target is a forward-looking statement not directly comparable to the register data.

findings.claim_text: Completeness check: carbon credits register entries with missing certificate_url
findings.explanation: Structural evidence gap: Two carbon credit entries (CC-2025-PV-001 'Trees for Global Benefits Uganda' and CC-2025-PV-002) have missing certificate_url fields. Required supporting documentation is incomplete. Retirement serial numbers and verification bodies are present for both entries.

summary.materiality_note: No material misstatements. Report is consistent with source data.
